title: Aureline provider account/session binding (governed acting-identity object)
description: Schema for the providers_account_session_binding_record: the governed account/session object embedded on every provider mapping-review row. The binding names who Aureline acts as for an action: the acting-identity class (connected human account, installation/app grant, or delegated credential), the bound account-scope identity row, the auth source, whether the account was policy-selected, the first-class provider session state (live, limited-scope, stale-credential, read-only, offline-capture, publish-later-only), and the effective write scope. The schema-of-record lives at /crates/aureline-provider/src/project_mapping/mod.rs. The full account-scope beta page (connected account, installation grant, delegated credential, effective-scope resolution, and scope-drift events) lives at /schemas/providers/effective_scope.schema.json; this file is the embeddable acting-identity object that mapping rows bind to. Raw access tokens, raw delegated-token bodies, and raw provider payloads are forbidden.

opaque_ref.description: Opaque ref safe for logs, manifests, support packets, and fixtures. Raw provider URLs and tokens are forbidden.
